title: RegistryEntity
description: Canonical JSON shape for every Service Bus registry entity (Namespace, Queue, Topic, Subscription, Rule). See specs/006-service-bus-registry-core/data-model.md §2.

id.description: Stable identifier; immutable after first save (FR-003, FR-012).

entityType.description: Closed enum discriminator (FR-001). Immutable after first save (FR-012).

name.description: Azure-Service-Bus-compliant logical name; case-preserved (FR-015, Edge Case 'Special characters').

fullyQualifiedName.description: Server-computed canonical path. Read-only from client perspective.

tags.description: Free-form key/value pairs (FR-002). Key matched case-insensitively, displayed case-preserved (research §9). Multi-value-per-key permitted.

owner.description: Free-form owning team/person identifier. NOT a reference to a Team entity in this slice.

environment.description: Configurable environment classification (FR-035). Cosmos partition key.

status.description: FR-013a status. 'Deleted' is reserved for a future soft-delete spec and MUST NOT appear here (FR-002 clarification).

source.description: FR-004. 'Manual' = spec-006 polymorphic create. 'Onboarded' = spec-008 namespace onboarding wizard (additive; only appears on Namespace entities with validation-verified provenance). 'Discovered' remains reserved for a future automatic-discovery spec and MUST NOT appear in either slice.

azureResourceId.description: ARM resource ID. Format-validated when present (FR-015, Edge Case 'Invalid Azure resource IDs').

namespaceName.description: Logical parent namespace name (echoes self for namespaces).

metadata.description: Extensible structured metadata (FR-002). Persisted as opaque JSON; projected to AI Search as flattened key=value pairs.

parentId.description: Required for Queue/Topic/Subscription/Rule (FR-008). Null for Namespace.
